body.probe: Igor emits a DEFERRED_TASK in a reply turn; job_manager executes it and the result appears in next TWM snapshot
body.title: Igor emits structured deferred self-addressed tasks
body.result: DEFERRED_TASK|type|payload format added. parse_deferred_tasks+strip+dispatch+push_result pipeline in main.py. 5 job types: memory_search, twm_read, ring_read, tool_call, note. Results route to TWM as deferred_self_task source, salience=0.85, skipping ACTION_IMPULSE. PROC_DEFERRED_SELF_TASK context_inject habit seeded. 21 tests, 1719 total green.
body.description: Igor is a single-pass system. After diagnosing a gap, he can't fetch context and re-enter. Need: a structured DEFERRED_TASK output format Igor emits from a reply turn (type, target, payload), plus a job_manager hook that picks these up and injects results into his next context via TWM push or memory deposit. Enables: 'fetch reading list and inject into next context', 'search memory for X and surface on next turn', pre-loading diagnostic context before a reasoning turn.
